Carrying the hopes and dreams of their fans, our racers
take off running!

As expected, all eyes are on the Arima Kinen winner Grass
Wonder and the spring Tenno Sho winner Special Week in
their first race together!

Will we finally see which of these two is the fastest? Will
one of them be the first to cross the finish line?!
She seems to be observing the race calmly.

The race's got two slopes to it, so she can't be wasting her
stamina here!

Our racers round the second corner and head into the
backstretch. One racer seems to be pulling ahead, but the
rest remain steadfast in their position.

King Halo stands at the front of the pack, and Special
Week follows close behind in fifth place!
I'm in perfect position and my pace is good...

Once I factor in my surroundings, I can figure out the right
time to—
Huh?
I don't see Grass! Is she hiding in someone's shadow?
No way... Could she be behind me?!
Stop that... focus on your own running!

Eight hundred meters to go! Each racer is picking up the
pace!

As they round the third corner, the pack closes in on the
lead!
All right...
Here I go!

Special Week makes her move! In an instant, she sweeps in
from the outside and makes for the lead!
Just gotta keep this up in the homestretch!

As the racers reach the fourth corner, it's Special Week!
Special Week has taken the lead! The stands are in an
uproar!

But here comes Grass Wonder from the outside! Grass
Wonder is gaining on her!
Gasp!

Will these two battle it out for first after all?! Special
Week and Grass Wonder both head into the final stretch!
Whoa, whoa! She's not shaking her!
This is just like when Rice marked me in our race!
I-is that so...
Well, this does feel fated, just like then...
To refine my run and stand at the top is my dream...
No matter how high my opponent soars...
I must go higher!
Hraaah!
Grass Wonder accelerates once more!
Urrrauugh!

Special Week does her best to shake her, but Grass
Wonder has caught up!

Will Special Week hold out?! Grass Wonder takes the lead!
Grass Wonder widens her lead more and more and more!
Just look at her go! Grass Wonder's might is terrifying!

Grass Wonder... passes the finish liiine! And in second
place is Special Week!

You can't top the greats! And of these two greats, Grass
Wonder has emerged triumphant!

The Derby Umamusume has fallen at the feet of the Beast,
Grass Wonder!
